title: Vendor c/image + Buildah after merging blob-info-caching in both
body:
<s>By no means production ready at this point (writes data to the working directory!), primarily to trigger CI.</s>

<s>NOTE: This, for now, includes https://github.com/containers/libpod/pull/1930 , which should be reviewed and merged separately.</s>

Now only vendors from `master` commits of c/image and Buildah, ready for merging.
Changes LGTM, but the ubuntu test seems unhappy.
